drawer.title: Better DeepSeek
drawer.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.

settings.injectSystemDateTime: Inject system date & time into messages
settings.preferredLangHint: Leave empty to let the model decide.
settings.markdownMaxDepthHint: Hard cap on DOM recursion depth when reconstructing markdown from a message. Lower = safer against stack overflow on deeply nested content; higher = preserves structure of pathologically nested messages. Default 200.
settings.chatSessionCapHint: Maximum number of chat sessions kept in memory for the sidebar. Older sessions beyond this cap are evicted (FIFO). Lower values reduce memory usage on long-lived tabs. Default 500.
settings.githubTokenHelp: Create a classic token with repo scope at GitHub Settings -> Tokens.
settings.tokenPriceHint: Shows estimated DeepSeek API cost per message and session total. Input/output token prices are used for estimation. Pricing data is fetched dynamically with fallbacks.
settings.contextGuardEnabledHint: Stops managed Deep Research before the chat context window is exhausted. Tracks hidden extension prompts, evidence digests, and server-reported usage.
settings.contextGuardLimitHint: DeepSeek web-chat context window size. Default 128,000 tokens.
settings.contextGuardStopPercentHint: Stop Deep Research when estimated context reaches {{threshold}} tokens. Clamped to 50-95%.
settings.collapseLongUserMessagesHint: Automatically hide very long user messages behind a read-more toggle.
settings.ragHint: Automatically retrieves relevant pieces from your project files.
settings.projectInstructionsPlaceholder: Custom instructions appended to the global system prompt for this project…
settings.resetSuccess: Language files reset to factory defaults.
settings.updateFailed: Failed to check for language updates.
settings.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved settings changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
settings.customCSSPlaceholder: /* Paste your CSS overrides here or pick a preset above */
settings.duplicateNameError: A snippet with this name already exists.

auto.correctionPrompt: Please analyze the error above, study the Library API Reference, then fix the code and provide the corrected version within the appropriate <BDS:{{tagName}}> tag. Pay close attention to: correct API method names, proper arguments, and the required save/output call at the end.

messageProcessor.longWorkClosed: LONG_WORK closed because API response ended.

whatsnew.title: What's New
whatsnew.brandingNote: Better DeepSeek is an open-source community project.
whatsnew.seeAllChanges: See all changes in v{{version}} on GitHub
whatsnew.seeDetailed: See detailed release notes on GitHub

v0_1_9.title: Multi-System Prompts, Visualizer Rework & Deep Research

feat_0.title: Multi-System Prompt Mode & Advanced Scheduling
feat_0.description: Use multiple system prompt entries with per-entry scheduling options - first message, every N turns, or always.

feat_1.title: Visualizer Rework
feat_1.description: Visualizer widgets can now be resized and downloaded. The entire UI has been reworked for a cleaner experience.

feat_2.title: DeepResearch
feat_2.description: Tell DeepSeek a topic, review the generated plan, and upon approval it conducts deep multi-step research automatically.

feat_3.title: Export/Import Overhaul
feat_3.description: All extension data (settings, skills, memories, characters, projects) can now be exported and imported with optional encryption support.

v0_1_8.title: Memory Rework, Saved Items & API Playground

feat_0.title: Memory Rework
feat_0.description: Called memory system has been reworked with a token overlap-based approach for better context matching.

feat_1.title: Saved Items (Bookmarks & Snippets)
feat_1.description: Save messages for later access. Create snippets and send them with a single click.

feat_2.title: Skill Creator Tool
feat_2.description: Ask AI to create a custom skill for you directly from the chat.

feat_3.title: Import Memory from Another AI
feat_3.description: Import your memory from other AI platforms into DeepSeek.

feat_4.title: API Playground
feat_4.description: A built-in playground to easily test the DeepSeek API.

feat_5.title: Auto Search Tool
feat_5.description: Replaced the removed Expert mode link reading and search with our own integrated search tool.

feat_6.title: Bug Fixes & UX Improvements
feat_6.description: Numerous bug fixes and UX refinements across the extension.

feat_0.title: Localization System
feat_0.description: Better DeepSeek now supports multiple languages. Help us improve translations or add your language on GitHub.

feat_1.title: Custom Prompts
feat_1.description: Create, save, and switch between multiple system prompts effortlessly.

feat_2.title: Project RAG Search
feat_2.description: A primitive RAG system has been added. Connect a project or select a local folder for file search. We'll continue improving this in future releases.

feat_3.title: UI Improvements
feat_3.description: Collapse/expand for long messages, extension icon opens DeepSeek website, server status and announcement banners and more...

feat_4.title: Bug Fixes & Performance
feat_4.description: BDS tool parser and Office tool improvements. Fixed font rendering issues. Various stability and performance optimizations and more...

feat_0.title: Android Version
feat_0.description: Better DeepSeek is now available on Android.

feat_1.title: Chat Filtering & Tags
feat_1.description: Organize your sessions by adding tags. Filter and group chats easily from the sidebar menu.

feat_2.title: Export UI Rework
feat_2.description: Newly designed export interface for Markdown, PDF, HTML, and Images. Export full sessions or specific parts.

feat_0.title: What's New Popup
feat_0.description: You're looking at it! We'll now keep you updated on the latest changes right here.

feat_1.title: Advanced Injection Control
feat_1.description: Choose between 'Always', 'First Message', or 'Every X' messages with customizable intervals for system prompts.

feat_2.title: Private Repo Support
feat_2.description: Import private repositories via GitHub Personal Access Tokens securely.

feat_3.title: Token & Price Estimation
feat_3.description: Real-time token usage estimation and context window display for API-equivalent usage.

feat_4.title: Disable Memory
feat_4.description: New toggle in Settings to prevent the extension from persisting conversation context.

feat_5.title: Stability Improvements
feat_5.description: Resolved issues with message handling and refined the overall UI state.

feat_0.title: Projects Menu
feat_0.description: Better organizational control for sessions and files.

feat_1.title: History Search
feat_1.description: Added search functionality to the session history sidebar.

feat_2.title: Advanced Settings
feat_2.description: Reworked settings menu with an accordion layout to save space and improve focus.

feat_3.title: Disable System Prompt
feat_3.description: New option to disable the Hidden System Prompt entirely when not needed.

feat_4.title: Force Language
feat_4.description: Ensure DeepSeek always responds in your preferred language, regardless of input.

feat_0.title: Ask Questions Tool
feat_0.description: DeepSeek can now ask for clarification when unsure about context or instructions.

feat_1.title: Markdown & PDF Export
feat_1.description: Export your full chat sessions to Markdown and PDF files.

feat_2.title: Prompt Reset
feat_2.description: Easily reset the system prompt to its default state.

feat_3.title: Navigation Fixes
feat_3.description: Resolved full page reloading issues when clicking the logo or 'New Chat'.

feat_0.title: Firefox Support
feat_0.description: Added experimental support for the Firefox browser.

feat_1.title: Enhanced Code Runners
feat_1.description: Updated Python runner and added new JS and TS execution environments.

feat_2.title: GitHub Auto-Fetch
feat_2.description: Inject GitHub repositories directly into the chat via the BDS:AUTO command.

feat_1.title: Voice Configuration
feat_1.description: Configurable voice and recognition languages available in Settings.

feat_2.title: Improved Navigation
feat_2.description: Logo and 'New Chat' are now real <a> tags, supporting 'Open in new tab'.

feat_3.title: Streaming Reliability
feat_3.description: Better handling of stalled streams and automatic closing of tags.
